title: Kuchi kuchi Rakkamma Lyrics Bombay
stanzas: <div>Kuchi kuchi Rakkamma Lyrics Bombay

[Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa
ponnu venum
koodasaali raakkammaa
ponnu venum

saathi sanam thoongayila
saama kozhi koovayila
Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa
koodasaali raakkammaa] (2)

kuchi kuchi raakkamma
varamaattaa
nee konji pesa
ponnu onnu tharamaattaa

saathi sanam thoongalaye
saama kozhi koovalaye

kuchi kuchi raakkamma
varamaattaa
nee konji pesa
ponnu onnu tharamaattaa

Kattu muyalukku pani pudikkum
gaanga kuyilukku veyil pudikkum
aani verukku man pudikkum
ye appanukku pen pudikkum

Arasan maganukku val pudikkum
azhutha kuzhandhaiku paal pudikkum
purushan jaamaththil kanaikayile
pombalaikku kili pudikkum

allum pagalume nanainthaalum
aaththu meenukkaa kuliredukkum
alli alli eduthaalum
aanandha poovukkaa
ponmaeni valikkum

ah potta pulla peththukodu
podhum ennai vidu. (2)
velicham eriya vittu
vetkaththai anaithuvidu.

kuchi kuchi raakkamma
varamaattaa
nee konji pesa
ponnu onnu tharamaattaa
saathi sanam thoongalaye
saama kozhi koovalaye (2)

Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa
koodasaali raakkammaa

Siragu neenginaal
paravai illai.
Thiriyai neenginaal
deepam illai.
unnai neenginal
naan illai.
unakkidhu puriyavillai.

udalai neenginaal
uyirum illai.
oliyai neenginaal
mozhiyum illai.
unnai neenginaal
naan illai.
unakkidhu theriyavillai.

boomi suttruvadhu
nindruvittal
puviyil endrume
maattramillai.

purushan suttruvadhu
nindruvittaal
ennaalum pen vazhvil
yaetrangal illai.

poththi vachcha
aasa vandhu.
neththiyilla thudikkudhu.(2)

patta idam paththikollum
thoorathil nerungi nillu.

Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa
koodasaali raakkammaa

kuchi kuchi raakkamma
varamaattaa
nee konji pesa
ponnu onnu tharamaattaa
saathi sanam thoongalaye
saama kozhi koovalaye (2)
Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kuchi Kuchi Rakkamma?

The song is an upbeat and energetic dance number that celebrates joy and festivity.

Who composed the music for Bombay?

AR Rahman composed the music for the movie Bombay.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song appears in a festive setting, adding to the vibrant and celebratory mood of the film.

Who are the singers of Kuchi Kuchi Rakkamma?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Swarnalatha.

When was the movie Bombay released?

The movie Bombay was released in 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kuchi Kuchi Rakkamma from the movie Bombay is a lively and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by Hariharan and Swarnalatha, the song is set against a festive backdrop, enhancing the vibrant atmosphere of the film. AR Rahman's dynamic composition, combined with Vairamuthu's playful lyrics, creates an irresistible dance number that resonates with audiences. The song conveys a sense of happiness and exuberance, making it a timeless favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kuchi Kuchi Rakkamma from the iconic film Bombay. This lively track, brought to life by the magical combination of AR Rahman's music and the voices of Hariharan and Swarnalatha, is sure to get you moving. Dive into the rhythmic beats and playful lyrics that have made this song a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa, I want a girl, koodasaali raakkammaa, I want a girl
People haven't slept, the rooster hasn't crowed, Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa, koodasaali raakkammaa
Kuchi kuchi raakkamma won't come, won't give a girl to talk sweetly
People haven't slept, the rooster hasn't crowed
Kuchi kuchi raakkamma won't come, won't give a girl to talk sweetly
The rabbit likes the cold, the cuckoo likes the sun, the root likes the soil, and the father likes a daughter
The prince likes the sword, the crying child likes milk, the man likes to dream at midnight, and the woman likes the parrot
Even if it's wet day and night, the fish in the river feels cold, even if picked gently, the flower's golden body hurts
Oh, the child is born, that's enough, leave me. Let the light burn, turn off the shyness.
Kuchi kuchi raakkamma won't come, won't give a girl to talk sweetly, people haven't slept, the rooster hasn't crowed
Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa, koodasaali raakkammaa
Without wings, it's not a bird. Without a wick, it's not a lamp. Without you, I'm not there. You don't understand this.
Without a body, there's no life. Without sound, there's no language. Without you, I'm not there. You don't know this.
If the earth stops spinning, there will never be change on earth.
If a man stops moving, there will be no progress in a woman's life.
The desire kept hidden is now pounding on the forehead.
Stay close to the place you love.
Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa, koodasaali raakkammaa
Kuchi kuchi raakkamma won't come, won't give a girl to talk sweetly, people haven't slept, the rooster hasn't crowed
Kuchi kuchi raakkammaa
